title: lycianthes stellata
intro: Lycianthes stellata, also known as the stellate lycianthes, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family that is native to Mexico and Central America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Lycianthes stellata include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as arthritis and eczema. Herbal preparations of Lycianthes stellata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
